name: qwen-orchestrator
displayName: Qwen Orchestrator — Professional AI Dev Team
description: Multi-agent orchestration for Qwen Code. 22 agents, 26 skills, 6 commands, 11 MCP orchestration tools (claim_task, heartbeat, get_stale_tasks, set_validation_commands, validate_task, report_progress/completion/blockage, log_event, check_dependencies, get_task_state). Single-task focus, heartbeat monitoring, continuation protocol, stale agent detection, delivery validation. Session isolation with MCP hooks. By Omar-Obando.
author: Omar-Obando

memory.description: Knowledge Graph for persistent context — entities, relations, decisions across sessions
